description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a light-colored wooden top featuring visible grain patterns and natural knots, giving it a rustic yet contemporary appearance. The tabletop is broad and flat, supported by a single, wide, black pedestal base that provides stability and a minimalist aesthetic. The wood surface appears untreated or lightly finished, emphasizing the natural texture and color variations of the material. The pedestal base is solid and geometric, contrasting sharply with the organic look of the tabletop. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, making the design clean and functional. This table would be suitable for communal or public use in urban parks, plazas, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A rectangular table with a light wood top and a solid black pedestal base, featuring a clean, modern design with natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the light wood tabletop and the central black pedestal base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the rectangular shape of the pedestal base.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the wood grain and the solid black base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the tabletop's depth and the central support structure.
